title: Pluribus
overview: The most miserable person on Earth must save the world from happiness.
reason: Created by acclaimed showrunner Vince Gilligan (Breaking Bad), this Apple TV+ series boasts exceptional critical reception with an 87 Metacritic score and an 8.0 IMDb rating from over 127,000 votes.

title: Wonder Man
overview: Simon and Trevor, two actors at opposite ends of their careers, chase life-changing roles.
reason: As a Marvel Studios production on Disney+, this show leverages a massive global franchise. It features a well-known lead actor and holds solid ratings, including a 7.6 IMDb score from over 12,000 votes.

title: HIS & HERS
overview: Two estranged spouses — one a detective, the other a news reporter — vie to solve a murder in which each believes the other is a prime suspect.
reason: With a powerful ensemble cast including Tessa Thompson and Jon Bernthal, this Netflix series has garnered significant audience engagement, reflected in its 7.2 IMDb rating from over 65,000 votes.

title: All Her Fault
overview: In Chicago, Marissa Irvine arrives at 14 Arthur Avenue, expecting to pick up her young son Milo from his first playdate with a boy at his new school. But the woman who answers the door isn't a mother she recognizes. She isn't the nanny. She doesn't have Milo. And so begins every parent's worst nightmare.

title: The Beast in Me
overview: A famous author is pulled into a twisted mind game with her rich, powerful new neighbor — who might be a murderer.
reason: This Netflix drama features an acclaimed cast including Emmy winners Claire Danes and Matthew Rhys. It has strong audience approval with a 7.4 IMDb rating from over 61,000 votes.
